name: bcg-toolkit
description: Draft branded HTML embeds and interactive SCORM activities for NovoEd and Rise directly from Claude Desktop. Claude orchestrates the component catalog, fills in your data, and renders everything live in a local browser tab — no API keys, no data leaves your machine.
long_description: The BCG U Toolkit turns Claude Desktop into an end-to-end Learning Design assistant. Ask Claude to 'draft a 3-card summary of the AI maturity phases' and the toolkit renders it live in your browser, ready to export to Rise as HTML or to NovoEd as a self-editing SCORM zip. 31 HTML components (cards, timelines, KPIs, stats, SWOT, pyramids, funnels, quizzes) and 16 interactive SCORM activities (flip cards, accordions, polls, drag-to-sort, hotspot, branching scenarios). Includes BCG and BCG U brand themes plus a Custom brand editor with full Arabic/Hebrew RTL support.

tools.name: list_components
tools.description: List every HTML + SCORM component with schema and example payloads.

tools.name: open_in_toolkit
tools.description: Open a component in the toolkit browser tab, pre-filled with your data.

tools.name: toolkit_status
tools.description: Check whether the local toolkit is running and how many browser tabs are connected.
